rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) is wholly unrelated to Educ. Code §34.001, which governs school district motor vehicle purchasing. No overlap in subject matter, operative effect, or procedural requirements.
quote: Sec. 34.001. PURCHASE OF MOTOR VEHICLES. (a) A school district may purchase school motor vehicles through the comptroller or through competitive bidding under Subchapter B, Chapter 44.
_note: No conflict; the two provisions address entirely distinct policy areas.
